title: codereview-p8i6-2c: LOG_ERR in new function uses old module name
description: ipv6_addr module logs as 'ipv6_addr' but LOG_MODULE_REGISTER is lichen_ipv6. Inconsistent. tagged codereview
close_reason: Fixed LOG_ERR/module name inconsistency in firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/ipv6_addr.c new function and all other functions for consistency with lichen_ipv6 LOG_MODULE_REGISTER. Synced with lichen/subsys version. Performed edits in logical chunks (new fn, IID fns, make/addr fns). Ran codereview 3x after chunks, filed codereview beads project-LICHEN-2dht and project-LICHEN-mtvp, fixed all. 3 clean passes with no P0-P2 findings. bd ready shows next work.
